title: Check Barcode Interface Connectivity Status and Calibrate the Scanner if Needed
summary: Use the Barcode Interface application on a Windows laptop to check the bottom-right connectivity indicator and perform the documented calibration action if the indicator is red.
when_to_use: Use this procedure when verifying scanner connectivity status in the Barcode Interface application during scanner setup or troubleshooting, and when the documented bottom-right connectivity indicator must be checked to determine whether calibration is needed.
not_for: Do not use this procedure to perform undocumented scanner configuration changes beyond the documented connectivity check and calibration action.
Do not use this procedure when Barcode Interface cannot be launched or when the connectivity indicator is not visible; escalate instead.

roles_and_responsibilities.responsibility: Launch Barcode Interface, inspect the bottom-right connectivity indicator, perform the documented calibration action if the indicator is red, and recheck the indicator after calibration.

safety_notes: Follow only the documented Barcode Interface actions from the source.
Do not add undocumented calibration steps; follow the onscreen instructions when calibration is required.
access_or_tools_needed: Windows laptop with Barcode Interface.exe installed
Access to the Barcode Interface application
Scanner connected through the documented dock setup

access_required: Access to a Windows laptop with Barcode Interface.exe
Access to the Barcode Interface application
system_preconditions: Scanner connected through the documented dock setup

external_references.quote_or_summary: Check connectivity on the bottom right of the screen. If green, skip this step. If red, click "Calibrate Scanner" and follow the onscreen instructions.

steps.title: Launch Barcode Interface
steps.purpose: Open the application used to inspect scanner connectivity status.
steps.instruction: Launch the Barcode Interface application on the laptop.
steps.expected_result: Barcode Interface opens and is available for connectivity inspection.
steps.healthy_condition: The Barcode Interface application launches successfully.
steps.failure_condition: The Barcode Interface application cannot be launched.

actions.label: Open Barcode Interface
actions.exact_action: Launch the Barcode Interface application on the laptop.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Barcode Interface application context from the Scanner Setup section.
Scanner Setup procedure artifact accompanying Barcode Interface use.

stop_or_escalate_if: Barcode Interface application cannot be launched.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Page 210, section 7.3.24 Scanner Setup, covers setup of a replacement scanner and references the Barcode Interface application on a Windows 10 or 11 laptop.

steps.title: Inspect the bottom-right connectivity indicator
steps.purpose: Locate the documented status indicator used to determine scanner connectivity state.
steps.instruction: Look at the connectivity indicator at the bottom right of the screen.
steps.expected_result: The bottom-right connectivity indicator is visible for status evaluation.
steps.healthy_condition: The connectivity indicator is visible on the Barcode Interface screen.
steps.failure_condition: The connectivity indicator is not visible.

actions.label: View connectivity indicator
actions.exact_action: Look at the connectivity indicator at the bottom right of the screen.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Barcode Interface screen context from the Scanner Setup section, specifically the bottom-right connectivity area if shown.
Scanner Setup visual context associated with the connectivity check.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Check connectivity on the bottom right of the screen.

steps.title: Determine whether the indicator is green or red
steps.purpose: Use the documented color states to decide whether calibration is required.
steps.instruction: Identify whether the indicator is green or red using the documented status colors.
steps.expected_result: The connectivity state is identified as green or red.
steps.healthy_condition: The indicator is green, which means this calibration step can be skipped.
steps.failure_condition: The indicator is red, indicating calibration is required.

actions.label: Interpret indicator color
actions.exact_action: Identify whether the indicator is green or red using the documented status colors.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Connectivity indicator color state on the Barcode Interface screen if visible.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: If green, skip this step. If red, click "Calibrate Scanner" and follow the onscreen instructions.

steps.title: Calibrate the scanner if the indicator is red
steps.purpose: Perform the documented corrective action when the connectivity indicator shows red.
steps.instruction: If the indicator is red, click "Calibrate Scanner" and follow the onscreen instructions.
steps.expected_result: The calibration process is started and completed by following the onscreen instructions.
steps.healthy_condition: Calibration is completed as directed by the application.
steps.failure_condition: Calibration cannot be started, cannot be completed, or the indicator remains red afterward.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Barcode Interface procedure context related to the Calibrate Scanner action.
Scanner Setup visual context that may show or accompany the Calibrate Scanner control.

stop_or_escalate_if: Connectivity indicator remains red after following the onscreen calibration instructions.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: If red, click "Calibrate Scanner" and follow the onscreen instructions.

steps.title: Recheck the connectivity indicator
steps.purpose: Confirm the connectivity state after the calibration process.
steps.instruction: Recheck the connectivity indicator after the onscreen calibration process.
steps.expected_result: The connectivity indicator is reviewed again after calibration.
steps.healthy_condition: The indicator no longer shows the red state after calibration.
steps.failure_condition: The indicator remains red after calibration.

actions.label: Verify post-calibration status
actions.exact_action: Recheck the connectivity indicator after the onscreen calibration process.

stop_or_escalate_if: Connectivity indicator remains red after following the onscreen calibration instructions.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Check connectivity on the bottom right of the screen. If green, skip this step. If red, click "Calibrate Scanner" and follow the onscreen instructions.

success_criteria: The Barcode Interface application is launched.
The bottom-right connectivity indicator is visible and its state is determined.
If the indicator is green, no calibration action is needed.
If the indicator is red, the documented Calibrate Scanner action is performed and the indicator is rechecked.
healthy_conditions: The connectivity indicator is visible at the bottom right of the screen.
The indicator is green, or no longer red after calibration.
failure_conditions: Barcode Interface application cannot be launched.
Calibration cannot be started or completed using the onscreen instructions.
Connectivity indicator remains red after following the onscreen calibration instructions.
escalation_guidance: Escalate if the connectivity indicator remains red after following the onscreen calibration instructions.
Escalate if the Barcode Interface application cannot be launched or the connectivity indicator is not visible.
